_comment: LatchGate OPA policy data — starter template.
Copy to data.json and adjust for your environment.
This file is loaded by OPA at startup (via the bundle in docker-compose).
acl: maps principal => allowed actions and sinks.
'*' is the wildcard principal (matches any authenticated caller).
SECURITY: the wildcard principal grants only low-risk read actions.
All write, high-risk, or service-specific actions require a named principal.

*._comment: Default permissions for any authenticated agent — read-only.

agent:my-agent._comment: Full permissions for a specific agent principal.

agent:read-only._comment: Read-only agent — can fetch HTTP but nothing else.
